generated_oml:
// C2: Physical Acting Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy occupancy sensors integrated into the physical building infrastructure for real-time occupancy monitoring, mapped to BIM elements and processed through Ditto middleware for synchronization with the virtual model."
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensors embedded in the LEED Platinum academic building for environmental monitoring, with metadata extracted from BIM for automated control logic generation in TwinLight framework."
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption monitoring devices integrated into the building infrastructure, feeding real-time operational data to the DT via Ditto for predictive analytics."
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "BIM-based lighting control units implementing TwinLight's adaptive algorithms for real-time adjustment based on live sensor feedback."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "HVAC control units with BIM-embedded configurations for automated climate management in the building's operational phase."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy occupancy sensors providing real-time occupancy data for DT operational monitoring and decision-making."
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensors monitoring building conditions with real-time synchronization to the DT via Ditto middleware."
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Energy monitoring devices capturing real-time energy consumption metrics for DT analytics and optimization."
]

instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Lighting control sensors feeding occupancy and brightness data to the DT for adaptive lighting management."
]

instance OccupancyTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor,
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance TemperatureTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor,
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance EnergyTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor,
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyData
]

instance LightingTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingController,
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingData
]

// C5: Data Storage
instance RealTimeOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance RealTimeEnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance RealTimeLightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

// C6: DT Models
instance BIMStaticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched 3D BIM models of building components (geometry, topology, spatial relationships) with embedded BCS metadata for DT runtime interfaces."
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Formalized control strategies (e.g., lighting algorithms in TwinLight/BOREALIS) embedded in BIM models for automated DT runtime interface generation."
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5-based 3D representations of the DT for immersive interactive monitoring and simulation."
]

instance BIMMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static BIM model enriched with BCS metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) extracted for DT runtime configuration."
]

// C7: Enablers
instance BIMTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools (e.g., Revit) used by Building Control Engineers to model devices and define control logic for DT integration."
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-to-model/model-to-text transformations automating BIM-to-DT runtime artifact generation."
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform enabling real-time bidirectional communication between physical devices and DT via DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted."
]

instance DittoPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source DT platform handling data exchange and service orchestration for DT runtime environment."
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich visualization environment providing immersive 3D interaction with the DT for stakeholder collaboration."
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture framework for integrating custom services (e.g., AI analytics, IoT gateways) without core disruption."
]

// C8: DT Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5-based real-time monitoring and visualization service for immersive 3D DT interaction."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) for energy efficiency, visual comfort optimization."
]

instance AutomatedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control service automating BIM-based strategies (e.g., TwinLight lighting algorithms) via real-time sensor feedback."
]

instance CustomPluginService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service framework for DT Engineers to develop custom plugins (e.g., IoT integration, AI-driven insights)."
]

// C9: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for energy efficiency and visual comfort optimization via reinforcement learning (BOREALIS)."
]

instance PerformanceMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ODTE metric quantifying DT interoperability and architectural coherence validation."
]

instance ControlLogicUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of BIM-based control strategies (e.g., lighting algorithms) based on live sensor feedback.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StakeholderCollaborationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Unified visualization service (Unreal Engine 5) facilitating decision-making across Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Relationships
BIMStaticModel DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTooling,
BIMStaticModel DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering,
ControlLogicModel DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTooling,
ControlLogicModel DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering,
VisualizationModel DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5,
BIMMetadataModel DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering,

ModelDrivenEngineering DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService,
ModelDrivenEngineering DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService,
ModelDrivenEngineering DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedControlService,
ModelDrivenEngineering DTDFVocab:enables CustomPluginService,

RealTimeMonitoringService DTDFVocab:provides StakeholderCollaborationAction,
PredictiveAnalyticsService DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimizationInsight,
PredictiveAnalyticsService DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicUpdateAction,
AutomatedControlService DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicUpdateAction,

EclipseHono DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService,
EclipseHono DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService,
EclipseHono DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedControlService,
DittoPlatform DTDFVocab:enables CustomPluginService,

RealTimeOccupancyData DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono,
RealTimeTemperatureData DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono,
RealTimeEnergyData DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono,
RealTimeLightingData DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono,

BIMStaticModel DTDFVocab:contains OccupancySensor,
BIMStaticModel DTDFVocab:contains TemperatureSensor,
BIMStaticModel DTDFVocab:contains EnergyMonitor,
BIMStaticModel DTDFVocab:contains LightingController,
BIMStaticModel DTDFVocab:contains HVACController

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control signals and commands to physical actuators (e.g., lighting, HVAC systems) through middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling closed-loop operation. This interaction is facilitated by the framework’s automated generation of runtime interfaces from BIM-enriched models, ensuring bidirectional communication between the virtual and physical domains. Control logic is embedded directly into BIM models during device modeling, ensuring consistency and real-time adaptability."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** time scale, with synchronization rates determined by sensor sampling frequencies and middleware protocols (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). For adaptive lighting (e.g., BOREALIS), iterative updates to control policies occur post-occupancy based on live sensor feedback, enabling dynamic optimization over time. The framework supports low-latency data exchange to ensure temporal coherence between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is a **service-oriented, modular ecosystem** orchestrated through a centralized framework with the following components:
  1. **Core DT**: A unified virtual representation of the physical building, synchronized with real-time data via Hono/Ditto.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto handles bidirectional communication between physical devices and the DT.
  3. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 provides immersive 3D interfaces for monitoring and control.
  4. **Service Layer**: Extensible extension points for DT Engineers to deploy custom services (e.g., analytics, IoT integration).
  5. **BIM Integration Layer**: Enriched BIM models serve as the semantic backbone for device modeling and runtime interface generation.
  The constellation ensures interoperability via standardized protocols and a unified architecture, enabling scalability across AECO projects."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans all lifecycle stages of the physical building:
  1. **Design Phase**: Enriched BIM models incorporate static and dynamic BCS components (e.g., sensors, actuators) for future-proofing.
  2. **Construction Phase**: BIM models are validated and transformed into runtime artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations) for automated deployment.
  3. **Operation Phase**: Real-time synchronization with physical sensors/actuators enables adaptive control (e.g., energy optimization via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS).
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: The modular architecture supports incremental updates to DT services and models without full redeployment. The framework ensures compatibility with existing AECO standards (e.g., BIM) throughout the lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **ODTE Metric**: Evaluates the interoperability and architectural coherence of the DT by measuring its synchronization with the physical building.
  2. **Model Validation**: BIM models are validated before transformation to ensure semantic consistency and accuracy.
  3. **Runtime Synchronization**: Real-time data exchange via Hono/Ditto minimizes latency and drift between physical and virtual representations.
  4. **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework supports iterative updates (e.g., BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning) to adapt control policies to evolving operational conditions.
  5. **Verification/Validation**: The Living Lab case study demonstrates the DT’s effectiveness in optimizing energy efficiency and operational costs, validating its practical applicability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for real-time data exchange, facilitating bidirectional communication between physical sensors and the DT. The architecture supports **MQTT/WebSocket protocols** (as implied by DT frameworks like Ditto) for low-latency, scalable connectivity, ensuring seamless integration with Building Control Systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **modular, service-oriented platform** with standardized extension points, enabling scalable hosting on centralized or distributed infrastructures. The framework automates the deployment process from BIM models to runtime artifacts, reducing manual effort while supporting edge-to-cloud integration for operational flexibility."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  1. **External IoT Systems**: Custom services (DT Engineers) extend functionality to include third-party IoT gateways and analytics platforms.
  2. **BIM Collaboration Tools**: Enriched BIM models serve as a semantic backbone for interoperability with design/construction tools (e.g., Revit).
  3. **Building Management Systems (BMS)**: Middleware (Hono/Ditto) bridges the DT with legacy BMS for bidirectional control.
  4. **Stakeholder Workflows**: Unified interfaces (Unreal Engine 5) enable collaboration across roles (e.g., Facility Managers, DT Engineers) without siloed tools."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to the following standards and methodologies:
  1. **BIM Standards**: AECO-specific standards (e.g., IFC, COBie) for modeling building components and their relationships.
  2. **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Standardized transformations (model-to-model/model-to-text) for automating DT deployment.
  3. **Middleware Standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto follow open-source protocols (e.g., MQTT, WebSockets) for interoperability.
  4. **Unreal Engine 5**: Industry-standard 3D visualization platform for DT interaction.
  5. **AECO Workflows**: Aligns with existing BIM-based engineering practices (e.g., TwinLight/BOREALIS projects)."
]
